pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requests a field named 'Owning Region', which export_result.sh checks for.
Task description specifies the format to be 'List', and verifier.py checks for 'list'.
Task description lists exact expected options: 'North America', 'EMEA', 'APAC'.
setup_openproject.sh creates 'Mobile Banking App' with identifier 'mobile-banking-app', and export_result.sh queries this identifier.
Task description explicitly requires setting region to 'EMEA'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a new project custom field named 'Owning Region' of type 'list' with exactly three options: 'North America', 'EMEA', and 'APAC'. The agent must then update the synthetic 'Mobile Banking App' project (identifier: 'mobile-banking-app') to set its Owning Region to 'EMEA'. All details are confirmed by the setup scripts, export routines, and task description.
